svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="wjQLDAA6E6sT0Hs-VPtD"> <mxGraphModel dx="2894" dy="1289" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart LR

 subgraph FE [\"FRONTEND PIPELINE — repo: web-frontend → S3 / CloudFront (own GitHub Actions)\"]
 direction LR
 F1[\"1· Source<br/>push to main → Actions (OIDC → AWS role)\"] --> F2[\"2· Build & Test<br/>npm ci · tsc · lint · Jest\"]
 F2 --> F3[\"3· Security scans<br/>SonarQube · Snyk SCA · Gitleaks\"]
 F3 --> F4[\"4· Deploy to STAGING<br/>S3 staging + CloudFront staging dist\"]
 F4 --> F5[\"5· Verify E2E<br/>Cypress / Playwright on staging\"]
 F5 --> F6{\"6· Manual approval\"}
 F6 -->|approved| F7[\"7· Promote to PROD<br/>S3 sync + CloudFront invalidation\"]
 F6 -->|reject / fail| F11[\"Hold<br/>current PROD stays live\"]
 F7 --> F8[\"8· Smoke test<br/>live URL health + critical paths\"]
 F8 --> F9[\"9· Monitor<br/>CloudWatch RUM / alarms\"]
 F9 -->|error spike| F10[\"Rollback<br/>re-point to previous versioned build / CloudFront CD\"]
 end

 subgraph BE [\"BACKEND PIPELINE — repo: api-backend → EKS (own GitHub Actions)\"]
 direction LR
 B1[\"1· Source<br/>push to main → Actions (OIDC → AWS role)\"] --> B2[\"2· Build & Unit Test<br/>pip install · pytest · docker build\"]
 B2 --> B3[\"3· Security scans<br/>SAST SonarQube · SCA Snyk · Secrets Gitleaks · IaC Checkov · Image Trivy\"]
 B3 --> B4[\"4· Package<br/>Cosign sign → push to ECR (git SHA)\"]
 B4 --> B5[\"5· Deploy to GREEN (idle env)<br/>Helm / ArgoCD → green EKS · OPA/Kyverno admission\"]
 B5 --> B6[\"6· Verify GREEN<br/>DAST OWASP ZAP · integration & smoke tests\"]
 B6 --> B7{\"7· Manual approval\"}
 B7 -->|approved| B8[\"8· Switch traffic<br/>Route 53 / ALB weights BLUE → GREEN\"]
 B7 -->|reject / fail| B9[\"Discard GREEN<br/>BLUE stays live\"]
 B8 --> B10[\"9· Monitor<br/>CloudWatch / Prometheus alarms\"]
 B10 -->|SLO breach| B11[\"Rollback<br/>weights → BLUE\"]
 end

 subgraph ENV [\"BACKEND PRODUCTION — EKS Blue/Green\"]
 direction TB
 R53([\"Route 53 / ALB<br/>weighted routing\"])
 R53 -->|\"before: 100%\"| BLUE[\"BLUE cluster<br/>current / previous\"]
 R53 -->|\"after switch: 100%\"| GREEN[\"GREEN cluster<br/>newly deployed\"]
 end

 B5 -.->|helm apply| GREEN
 B8 -.->|update weights| R53

 NOTE[\"Both lanes follow the same shape: build → scan → deploy to an IDLE / STAGING target → verify → approve → promote → smoke → monitor, with a fast rollback.<br/>Backend blue/green alternates colours each release (previous colour = instant rollback). Frontend keeps versioned, fingerprinted build artifacts so promotion and rollback are just a re-point.\"]

 classDef src fill:#E1F0FF,stroke:#4A90D9,color:#13314f;
 classDef test fill:#D5E8D4,stroke:#82B366,color:#274d1f;
 classDef sec fill:#F8CECC,stroke:#B85450,color:#5e1f1c;
 classDef pkg fill:#FCE4CC,stroke:#E8943A,color:#5c3a12;
 classDef dep fill:#E6D9F2,stroke:#8C5BC7,color:#3c1d63;
 classDef verify fill:#DCEFE9,stroke:#3CA99A,color:#11463e;
 classDef gate fill:#FFF2CC,stroke:#D6B656,color:#5a4a14;
 classDef prod fill:#E0F5F1,stroke:#3CA99A,color:#11463e;
 classDef danger fill:#F8CECC,stroke:#B85450,color:#5e1f1c;
 classDef blue fill:#D6E4F5,stroke:#1F6FBF,color:#0f335e;
 classDef green fill:#D9EFDD,stroke:#2E8B57,color:#14421f;
 classDef note fill:#FFFDF0,stroke:#C9B458,color:#5a4a14;

 class F1,B1 src;
 class F2,B2 test;
 class F3,B3 sec;
 class F7,B4 pkg;
 class F4,B5 dep;
 class F5,F8,B6,F9,B10,R53 verify;
 class F6,B7 gate;
 class B8 prod;
 class F11,F10,B9,B11 danger;
 class BLUE blue;
 class GREEN green;
 class NOTE note;",
 "config": null

div.div:
Both lanes follow the same shape: build → scan → deploy to an IDLE / STAGING target → verify → approve → promote → smoke → monitor, with a fast rollback.
Backend blue/green alternates colours each release (previous colour = instant rollback). Frontend keeps versioned, fingerprinted build artifacts so promotion and rollback are just a re-point.
